title: [Show and Tell] Introducing AgentScope-Go: A Golang implementation of AgentScope framework
body:
Hi @chickenlj @DavdGao @qbc2016 @AlbumenJ @pan-x-c,

Excited to share a major milestone — **[agentscope-go v2.0.3](https://github.com/AlanFokCo/agentscope-go/releases/tag/v2.0.3) has been officially r…
